'''yathoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kadangustin|kadangustin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-th-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kadangustin|kadangustin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yathoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yætheketh|yætheketh]] || [[word:yæthekej|yæthekej]] || [[word:yæthekesh|yæthekesh]] || [[word:yætheke|yætheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yathothokoth|yathothokoth]] || [[word:yathothokoj|yathothokoj]] || [[word:yathothokosh|yathothokosh]] || [[word:yathothoko|yathothoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yathokoth|yathokoth]] || [[word:yathokoj|yathokoj]] || [[word:yathokosh|yathokosh]] || [[word:yathoko|yathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yathofkoth|yathofkoth]] || [[word:yathofkoj|yathofkoj]] || [[word:yathofkosh|yathofkosh]] || [[word:yathofkof|yathofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yathokotho|yathokotho]] || [[word:yathokojo|yathokojo]] || [[word:yathokosho|yathokosho]] || [[word:yathokoko|yathokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yathokoth|yathokoth]] || [[word:yathokoj|yathokoj]] || [[word:yathokosh|yathokosh]] || [[word:yathoko|yathoko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yathokothol|yathokothol]] || [[word:yathokojol|yathokojol]] || [[word:yathokoshol|yathokoshol]] || [[word:yathokokol|yathokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yathokothotho|yathokothotho]] || [[word:yathokojojo|yathokojojo]] || [[word:yathokoshosho|yathokoshosho]] || [[word:yathokoko|yathokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yathokothon|yathokothon]] || [[word:yathokojon|yathokojon]] || [[word:yathokoshon|yathokoshon]] || [[word:yathokokon|yathokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yathokothoro|yathokothoro]] || [[word:yathokojoro|yathokojoro]] || [[word:yathokoshoro|yathokoshoro]] || [[word:yathokokoro|yathokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
